character_buff.name: Al Bezaha
character_buff.description: Casts self-hypnosis to temporarily enhance oneself, disorienting nearby enemies. Daneb in the [Al Bezaha] state has a 1% chance to apply [Sight Blocking] to attacking enemies.
character_buff.target: Up to 15 enemies within a 4m radius

effects: Applies [Al Bejaha] to the caster upon activation
Enhances normal attack damage based on critical damage increase (up to 2x)
Increases defense ignore by an additional [Agility]*0.07%

skills.name: Sarab
skills.description: You become stealthy and summon [Daneves Illusion]. The illusion roams at a certain distance from the summoner, mimicking the summoners actions but attacking from different locations to distract the enemy. The illusion cannot deal damage but accumulates damage received to enhance the summoners skills.

effects: Summons [Daneves Illusion] at a designated location within a 5m radius of the caster
Applies [Will of Bakir] when [Daneves Illusion] is present
Grants [Stealth Art] proportional to skill level when cast
Additional bonuses to the stats of the summoned [Daneves Illusion] based on skill level
Additional bonuses to immunity, max HP, defense, and elemental resistance proportional to the casters total [Strength]
Additional defense level bonus proportional to the casters total [Strength]
